---
title: "About"
image: catt.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter-x 
      text: x.com
      href: https://x.com/menschikowan
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/menshikow

---
mathematics undergrad

Interested in: 

**Pure Mathematics**, **Game Theory**, **Deep Learning Theory**, **Systems Programming**

<hr style="margin-top: 50px; opacity: 0.2;">

<div style="text-align: center; max-width: 400px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px;">
  <p style="font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 15px;">Email notifications</p>
  
  <form
    action="https://buttondown.com/api/emails/embed-subscribe/menschikow"
    method="post"
    class="embeddable-buttondown-form"
    style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;"
  >
    <input 
      type="email" 
      name="email" 
      id="bd-email" 
      placeholder="you@example.com" 
      style="padding: 10px; border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;"
    />
    <input 
      type="submit" 
      value="Subscribe" 
      style="background: #333; color: white; padding: 10px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer;"
    />
    <p style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #666;">
      <a href="https://buttondown.com/refer/menschikow" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: underline;">
        Powered by Buttondown.
      </a>
    </p>
  </form>
</div>
